about.title: About Us
about.description: We are a team committed to connecting students with tutors willing to help. We facilitate learning through a platform that promotes trust and effective connection, ensuring an accessible and quality support experience.

community.title: Community
community.description: We create a collaborative learning community between students and tutors.

learning.title: Learning
learning.description: We facilitate the learning process with effective and personalized methodologies.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We guarantee high-quality tutors, selected for their academic excellence.

flexibility.title: Flexibility
flexibility.description: We offer flexible schedules that adapt to each student's needs.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Transform the educational experience at Uniandes, creating an ecosystem where knowledge flows freely among students. We seek to eliminate barriers in learning and foster a culture of collaboration and academic excellence.

termsOfUse.title: TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF USE
termsOfUse.intro: Welcome to Calico Tutorías. By accessing and using this website and/or application, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, you must not use the platform.

s1.title: 1. Description of the service
s1.body: Calico Tutorías is a platform that facilitates contact and management of tutoring between students and tutors. The platform acts solely as an intermediary and does not guarantee specific academic outcomes.

s2.title: 2. Users
s2.body: The following may register as users:
items: Students seeking tutoring services.
Tutors offering tutoring services.
s2.after: By registering, you declare that the information you provide is truthful, complete, and up to date.

s3.title: 3. Registration and account
items: Each user is responsible for keeping their login credentials confidential.
Creating fake accounts or impersonating third parties is prohibited.
We reserve the right to suspend or cancel accounts that breach these Terms.

s4.title: 4. Tutor obligations
items: Provide truthful information about their background and experience.
Deliver tutoring in a professional and respectful manner.
Honor the schedules and conditions agreed with students.
s4.after: Calico Tutorías does not exhaustively verify tutors’ academic credentials unless expressly stated otherwise.

s5.title: 5. Student obligations
items: Use the platform appropriately and respectfully.
Honor payment agreements and schedules agreed with tutors.
Not use the platform for purposes other than educational ones.

s6.title: 6. Payments and fees
items: Payments for tutoring are processed through the Wompi payment gateway (and related payment methods).
The platform may charge a commission for use of the service, which will be disclosed to users in advance.
We are not responsible for direct financial disputes between students and tutors, except as provided in our internal policies.

s7.title: 7. Cancellations and refunds
s7.body: Cancellation and refund conditions will depend on each tutor’s policy and/or the platform’s general policies, which will be available to users.

s8.title: 8. Prohibited conduct
items: Using the platform for illegal activities.
Sending offensive, discriminatory, or inappropriate content.
Sharing other users’ personal data without their consent.

s9.title: 9. Limitation of liability
s9.body: Calico Tutorías is not liable for:
items: The quality, accuracy, or outcomes of tutoring.
Damages or losses arising from interactions between students and tutors.
Technical failures or service interruptions.

s10.title: 10. Intellectual property
s10.body: All platform content (logos, text, design, software) is owned by Calico Tutorías or its licensors and is protected under applicable law.

s11.title: 11. Changes
s11.body: We may modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Changes take effect when published on the platform.

s12.title: 12. Governing law and jurisdiction
s12.body: These Terms and Conditions are governed by the laws of Colombia, and any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of that jurisdiction.

s13.title: 13. Contact
s13.body: For questions, you may contact us at:

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.body: At Calico ("we", "our", or "the platform"), we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, share, and protect your information when you use our online tutoring services.

s2.title: 2. Information We Collect
s2.intro: We collect different types of information to provide and improve our services:
sub1Items: Registration data: name, email address, password, role (student or tutor)
Profile information: profile photo, biography, subjects of interest, academic level
Payment information: data needed to process transactions (securely handled by third parties)
Communications: messages sent through the platform, ratings, and reviews
sub2Items: Usage data: pages visited, features used, time on the platform
Device information: device type, operating system, browser, IP address
Cookies and similar technologies: to improve the user experience

s3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
s3.intro: We use the information we collect to:
items: Provide, maintain, and improve our tutoring services
Facilitate connections between students and tutors
Process payments and maintain transaction records
Communicate with you about updates, session reminders, and important notifications
Personalize your experience on the platform
Protect the security and integrity of the platform
Comply with legal obligations and resolve disputes
Analyze platform usage to improve our services

s4.title: 4. Sharing Information
s4.intro: We may share your information in the following circumstances:
items: Between users: Your profile and availability are visible to other users according to platform settings
Service providers: We share data with third parties that help us operate the platform (payment processing, calendar services, cloud storage)
Legal compliance: When required by law or to protect our rights
With your consent: In any other case with your express authorization
s4.noSell: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

s5.title: 5. Data Security
s5.intro: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. This includes:
items: Encryption of data in transit and at rest
Secure authentication through Firebase Authentication
Strict access controls
Regular security monitoring
s5.after: However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to protect your information, we cannot guarantee absolute security.

s6.title: 6. Your Rights
items: Access: Request a copy of your personal data
Rectify: Correct inaccurate or incomplete information
Erase: Request deletion of your personal data
Restrict: Limit how we process your data
Data portability: Receive your data in a structured format
Object: Object to processing of your data in certain circumstances
Withdraw consent: At any time, when processing is based on your consent
s6.after: To exercise these rights, contact us through the means indicated in the contact section.

s7.title: 7. Data Retention
s7.body: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, unless the law requires or permits a longer retention period. Session and transaction data are retained in accordance with legal and accounting requirements.

s8.title: 8. Cookies and Similar Technologies
s8.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience, analyze platform usage, and provide personalized features. You can control cookies through your browser settings, although this may affect some platform features.

s9.title: 9. Google Calendar Data Usage
s9.intro: Calico optionally integrates with Google Calendar so tutors can sync their availability. This section specifically describes how we access, use, store, and protect data obtained through the Google Calendar API.
s9.sub1Intro: When a tutor voluntarily connects their Google account, Calico requests read-only access to the tutor's Google Calendar events. Specifically, the application:
sub1Items: Lists the tutor's calendars to identify the designated availability calendar.
Reads the titles, dates, and times of events in that calendar for the next 60 days.
Does not access emails, contacts, Drive files, or any other Google data outside the availability calendar events.
s9.sub2Intro: Google Calendar data is used exclusively to:
sub2Items: Import the tutor's time blocks as availability slots in the Calico platform, so students can view and book sessions.
Keep the tutor's availability up to date when they manually trigger a sync.
s9.sub2After: Google Calendar data is not used for advertising, profiling, behavioral analytics, or any purpose other than those described above.
s9.sub3Body: Raw Google Calendar data (titles, descriptions, event IDs) is not stored in our database. Only the derived availability blocks (day of week, start time, end time) are persisted. Google access and refresh tokens are stored in secure httpOnly cookies in the tutor's browser, not in our database.
s9.sub4Body: Data obtained through the Google Calendar API is not shared, sold, or transferred to any third party, advertising platform, data broker, or any other party, except as required by law.
s9.sub5Title: 9.5 Limited Use Disclosure (Google API Limited Use)
s9.sub5Intro: Calico's use of information received from Google APIs adheres to the
s9.sub5PolicyLabel: Google API Services User Data Policy
s9.sub5After: , including the Limited Use requirements. Specifically:
sub5Items: Use of data is limited to providing and improving user-facing features visible in the Calico interface.
Data is not transferred to third parties except to fulfill the described functionality, with user consent, or for legal reasons.
No Calico employee or contractor reads the user's Google Calendar data unless explicitly authorized by the user or required for security or legal compliance.
Google API access is not used to develop, improve, or train artificial intelligence or machine learning models.
s9.sub6Body: Tutors can disconnect their Google Calendar at any time from the availability section in Calico. They can also revoke access directly from their
s9.sub6LinkLabel: Google Account > Security > Third-party apps with account access
s9.sub6After: . Upon revoking access, Calico will no longer be able to sync availability, but already-imported blocks will remain until the tutor deletes them.

s10.title: 10. Third-Party Services
s10.intro: Our platform integrates the following third-party services:
items: PostgreSQL / Neon: Relational database for storing profiles, sessions, and availability.
Google Calendar API: Optional tutor availability sync (see section 9).
AWS S3: Secure storage for payment receipts and profile pictures.
Brevo (formerly Sendinblue): Transactional email delivery (account verification, session reminders).
Google Meet: Video call link generation for virtual sessions, via Calico's central calendar.
s10.after: Each of these services has its own privacy policy. We encourage you to review them.

s11.title: 11. Children's Privacy
s11.body: Our services are aimed at university students. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If we learn that we have collected information from a child without appropriate parental consent, we will delete that information promptly.

s12.title: 12. Changes to This Policy
s12.body: We may update this privacy policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices or for legal reasons. We will notify you of material changes through a prominent notice on the platform or by email. The "Last updated" date at the top indicates when this policy was last revised.

s13.title: 13. International Transfers
s13.body: Your data may be transferred to and processed on servers located outside your country of residence. When we transfer data internationally, we implement appropriate safeguards to protect your information in accordance with this policy and applicable laws.

s14.title: 14. Contact
s14.intro: If you have questions, concerns, or wish to exercise your rights regarding your personal information, contact us:
s14.after: We will respond to your request within a reasonable time in accordance with applicable laws.

s15.title: 15. Consent
s15.body: By using our platform, you accept the terms of this privacy policy and consent to the processing of your personal information as described here. If you do not agree with this policy, please do not use our services.
